name: request_id
description: UUID4 assigned to each inference request

name: timestamp_utc
description: UTC timestamp of the routing decision

name: h_route
description: Aggregated Shannon entropy of attention distributions (routing signal)

name: tau
description: Routing threshold tau active at decision time

name: error_probability
description: P(error | h_route) from the isotonic regression calibrator

name: input_tokens
description: Number of tokens in the input after tokenization

name: total_latency_ms
description: End-to-end inference latency including model call (ms)

name: probe_model
description: HuggingFace model ID used as the entropy probe

name: is_error
description: Ground-truth error label (populated asynchronously after human eval)

name: model_label
description: Output label returned by the downstream model

name: model_score
description: Output confidence score returned by the downstream model

name: metadata
description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached by the caller
